glosses.hi: स्पष्ट रूप से; साफ़ तौर पर
glosses.ja: はっきりと; 明確に

translations.zh-Hans: 你把问题解释得很清楚。
translations.yue: 你將個問題解釋得好清楚。
translations.he: אתה מסביר את הבעיה בצורה ברורה.
translations.vi: Bạn giải thích vấn đề rất rõ ràng.
translations.nl: Je legt het probleem duidelijk uit.
translations.hi: तुम समस्या को स्पष्ट रूप से समझाते हो.
translations.ja: あなたは問題をわかりやすく説明します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; marks the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, taking 'le problème' as direct object.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'expliques' to indicate how the explanation is given.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner introducing the noun 'problème'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'expliques'.

sentences.target: On voit clairement la pluie arriver.

translations.fr: On voit clairement la pluie arriver.
translations.en: We can clearly see the rain coming.
translations.es: Vemos claramente que viene la lluvia.
translations.de: Wir sehen deutlich, dass der Regen kommt.
translations.it: Vediamo chiaramente che sta arrivando la pioggia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们清楚地看到雨要来了。
translations.ru: Мы ясно видим, что дождь приближается.
translations.pt: Vemos claramente que a chuva está chegando.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy rõ cơn mưa đang đến.
translations.nl: We zien duidelijk dat de regen eraan komt.
translations.uk: Ми чітко бачимо, що дощ наближається.
translations.hu: Egyértelműen látjuk, hogy közeledik az eső.
translations.hi: हम साफ़ तौर पर देख रहे हैं कि बारिश आ रही है.
translations.el: Βλέπουμε καθαρά ότι έρχεται η βροχή.
translations.nb: Vi ser tydelig at regnet kommer.
translations.id: Kami dapat melihat dengan jelas bahwa hujan akan datang.
translations.sv: Vi ser tydligt att regnet är på väg.
translations.da: Vi kan tydeligt se, at regnen kommer.
translations.fi: Näemme selvästi, ότι sade on tulossa.
translations.ja: 雨が近づいているのがはっきり見えます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun (often colloquial for 'nous'); triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'la pluie' as direct object and 'arriver' as a non-finite complement.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'voit' to express the clarity of perception.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'pluie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'voit' and understood subject of the infinitive 'arriver'.
Infinitive verb; non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'voit' describing the event involving 'la pluie'.

sentences.target: C'est clairement trop cher pour nous.

translations.fr: C'est clairement trop cher pour nous.
translations.en: It's clearly too expensive for us.
translations.es: Es claramente demasiado caro para nosotros.
translations.de: Es ist eindeutig zu teuer für uns.
translations.it: È chiaramente troppo caro per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这对我们来说显然太贵了。
translations.yue: 呢樣嘢對我哋嚟講明顯太貴。
translations.ru: Это явно слишком дорого для нас.
translations.pt: É claramente caro demais para nós.
translations.tr: Bu bizim için açıkça fazla pahalı.
translations.vi: Nó rõ ràng quá đắt đối với chúng tôi.
translations.ar: من الواضح أنه غالٍ جدًا بالنسبة لنا.
translations.nl: Het is duidelijk te duur voor ons.
translations.uk: Це явно надто дорого для нас.
translations.hi: यह हमारे लिए साफ़ तौर पर बहुत महंगा है.
translations.pl: To jest wyraźnie za drogie dla nas.
translations.el: Είναι ξεκάθαρα πολύ ακριβό για εμάς.
translations.nb: Det är tydeligvis för dyrt för oss.
translations.id: Ini jelas terlalu mahal untuk kami.
translations.sv: Det är uppenbart för dyrt för oss.
translations.ro: Este clar prea scump pentru noi.
translations.cs: Je to zjevně příliš drahé pro nás.
translations.da: Det er tydeligvis for dyrt for os.
translations.fi: Se on selvästi meille liian kallis.
translations.ja: それは私たちには明らかに高すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative pronoun elided before a vowel; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; links the subject 'C'' to the predicate 'trop cher'.
Stance/sentence adverb; modifies the clause/predicate, indicating evident evaluation.
Degree adverb; modifies 'cher' to express excess ('too expensive').
Adjective in predicate position; masculine singular form serving as the complement of the copula.
Preposition introducing the prepositional complement 'nous' (beneficiary/recipient).
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Vous avez clairement oublié mon message.

translations.fr: Vous avez clairement oublié mon message.
translations.de: Sie haben meine Nachricht ganz offensichtlich vergessen.
translations.it: Avete chiaramente dimenticato il mio messaggio.
translations.yue: 你明顯唔記得咗我嘅訊息。
translations.he: אתה בבירור שכחת את ההודעה שלי.
translations.vi: Bạn rõ ràng đã quên tin nhắn của tôi.
translations.nl: U bent mijn bericht duidelijk vergeten.
translations.hi: आप स्पष्ट रूप से मेरा संदेश भूल गए.
translations.el: Εσείς ξεκάθαρα ξεχάσατε το μήνυμά μου.
translations.nb: Du har tydeligvis glemt meldingen min.
translations.sv: Du har helt klart glömt mitt meddelande.
translations.cs: Zjevně jste zapomněli na mou zprávu.
translations.da: Du har tydeligvis glemt min besked.
translations.ja: あなたは明らかに私のメッセージを忘れました。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person plural (or formal singular); marks the subject.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural; forms the passé composé with the past participle 'oublié'.
Adverb of manner/stance; modifies the verb phrase to indicate evidentness.
Past participle serving as the main lexical verb in a compound past; transitive, selecting 'mon message' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'message'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'oublié'.
